description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a fenced rectangular yard, featuring a prominent red gable roof and a carport on one side. The exterior walls are dark gray with white trim, and the structure includes several large windows and doors, providing ample natural light. The property is landscaped with two large trees and a cluster of bushes, and the backyard is mostly open grass. The carport is supported by wooden posts and shelters a blue vehicle. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms including a kitchen, living area, and bedrooms. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on horizontal lines and open outdoor space.
description: A single-story, dark gray bungalow with a red gable roof, carport, and fenced yard, featuring large windows and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above the backyard, highlighting the red gable roof, carport, and two large trees within the fenced yard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the long side of the bungalow, emphasizing the row of windows, the carport, and the main entrance with steps and bushes nearby.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the bungalow from the opposite end, focusing on the carport, blue vehicle, and the open grassy backyard with a single tree.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the front facade with the carport and porch area, as well as the main entrance and a tree to the right.
